name: Quatz
description: A compact four-barreled design packing a self-charging capacitor that discharges upon every reload from empty. Features auto hip-fire and aimed fire is semi-auto, four-shot instant burst.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: A compact four-barreled design packing a self-charging capacitor that discharges upon every reload from empty. Features auto hip-fire and aimed fire is semi-auto, four-shot instant burst.

components.name: Neurodes
components.description:
Biotech sensor organ harvested from Infested entities.

Location: Earth, Lua, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Quatz and Kuva Quartakk’s burst fire mode not working when the shoot input is set to scrolling the mouse wheel.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed extreme fire rates with an unmodded Kuva Quartakk and the Quatz when using a rapid combination of mouse clicks.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix: 29.2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Quatz reload and Plinx charge reload audio issues when a Skin is equipped.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes: Fixed being able to bypass the cooldown between scoped shots with the Kuva Quartakk and Quatz by scoping and unscoping between shots.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Kuva Lich Changes 27.1.0 + 27.1.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash when aiming with Quatz (possibly other similar weapons that change fire mode on aim) and switching weapons while Mirage Hall of Mirrors is active.

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Client’s Warframe continuously firing the Quatz after Transferring to the Operator.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an additional stream of bullet FX shooting from the Quatz’ grip when a pistol skin is equipped.
Fixed Quatz clip disappearing if you interrupted reload at just the right time.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.4.1 + 25.4.1.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Quatz’ reload ejected clip flipping orientation when released.
Fixed the Quatz’ Electric Discharge sound playing twice for Clients.
Fixed the Quatz’ special reload damage and VFX not displaying when a Skin is equipped.
Fixed Mirage’s Hall Of Mirrors ability causing the Quatz’ Electric Discharge sound to unintentionally play duplicate instances.

patchlogs.name: Tenno Reinforcements: Update 25.4.0
patchlogs.changes:
The only thing Grineer hate more than seeing Tenno cut through waves of Lancers, is seeing them use Grineer Weapons to do it. Wield the power of the Grineer’s vast empire with the latest Tenno Reinforcements on PC: the Quatz Collection!
*Quatz Pro Tip: start firing from the hip and aim while keeping the trigger held down to stay in auto mode!
Pick up the Quatz Collection or any of the individual items by visiting the in-game Market today, and put Grineer technology to use helping the Origin System instead of conquering it!
